1 − 1: You are overflowing with restless energy, and unexpected opportunities keep arising. You can clearly feel that something in your life is beginning, and this stirs your excitement. Sitting still and doing nothing is simply impossible right now — you need to be doing something, rushing somewhere. The urge to start something and achieve immediate results is extremely strong, so to avoid swift disappointment it is important to remember that the time for achievement has not yet come. Most likely the idea that has gripped you this month will be short-lived, yet it will still serve as a step forward, toward more lasting results.
1 − 2: Something new may emerge in your life, but to make it happen you may need to take a step toward someone, to show initiative. As a result you may be able to find a solution to a long-standing problem, to set in motion a matter that had stalled. Or at the very least to learn something new about yourself. This is a good month for signing contracts intended for the long term and beneficial to both sides.
1 − 3:
This month is likely to become the most interesting and active of the whole year. A wave of fresh energy moves you to take up new work or set off on a journey. Do not wait for the weather to change at the seaside — do at least something among the things you have long dreamed of.
This is a good month to take up something creative and engaging — for example, to start painting or writing a book. That said, it may also be yet another infatuation, since you will be more susceptible than usual to the charms of the opposite sex.
1 − 4:
A new undertaking in your work or family life is likely. Do not fear difficulties or heightened responsibility.
This year you are organized and hardworking, and the energy impulse of the One is exactly what you need to look at the world more optimistically and take even the most stubborn of obstacles by storm. It is quite possible that one of this month's undertakings will later become an important long-term project that will retain its significance even many years from now.
1 − 5:
Many exciting opportunities — perhaps even too many, so your undertakings may turn out to be short-lived, at least some of them. Still, it is not necessary to gain a lasting practical result from every endeavor.
Right now the pleasure that fresh impressions bring you is enough in itself. Travel, meet new people, try unfamiliar dishes. You will feel that the world has become wider and more interesting.
1 − 6:
A month of active steps aimed at creating more comfortable and favorable living conditions. This is a good time to meet a future life partner, to acquire a home or a country house, and for all the new and pleasant matters connected with family, children, and home.
The vibrations of this month will help you uncover the talent of an artist, performer, or musician within yourself. If you are nurturing some creative idea, then now is exactly the right moment to begin bringing it to life.
1 − 7:
Risks and explorations have probably given you a new understanding of life, and this month you feel a strong desire to begin acting in accordance with this new understanding, to take some decisive steps.
Keep in mind, however, that although you now see the situation very deeply, you may end up missing the forest for the trees and do something you will later regret. Do not take jealousy and excessive suspicion as your advisers.
1 − 8:
This is a very important year of your life, and the new venture you begin now will be supported by all the experience and all the resources of the preceding years. Start a new business or take on another large-scale project. Be ambitious and believe in success, and make full use of your influence over those around you.
It will be useful, however, to remember that in the near future you will not have so much energy, means, and influence at your disposal. So try to accomplish as much as possible right now, to create a powerful forward momentum that will allow your plan to keep moving by inertia when more difficult times come.
1 − 9:
You feel a strong desire to begin something new, yet you should remember that this is the closing year of the Epicycle. It is quite possible that by October you will already sense what awaits you in the next Epicycle, and you will dive into your future with interest even before the Year of the Nine concludes.
However, whatever captures your imagination in January is unlikely to prove lasting. Perhaps you will finally decide to try something you have long dreamed of. In any case you will gain interesting experience and new impressions — and does it really matter that the January enthusiasm will not last very long?
2 − 1: You feel a strong desire to move forward and act at once, yet a great many small details demand your attention and slow your progress. Try not to hurry; relax, show diplomacy and tact, and make an effort to understand your partners. In this way you will spare a great deal of energy and nerves, both for yourself and for others. You will feel the slowdown especially clearly in October. At this time delays connected with other people's busyness and a lack of resources are likely. Cultivate patience, analyze the situation, and strengthen your partnerships. An important piece of advice may come to you from some woman.
2 − 2: Be very patient. If there is such an opportunity, take a vacation and rest. If not, decide for yourself that there is nowhere you need to rush — you can stop, think, and recall all the small matters you previously kept putting off. Accumulate important information and take a good look around: perhaps you will discover sources of support you had not noticed before.
2 − 3: The time has come to attend to the detailed working-out of the creative ideas you took up the previous month. Most likely the pace of life will now slow somewhat, and you will have to speak less yourself and instead listen more to those around you. In return you will gain the chance to look at your project from the perspective of others and perhaps discover its weak points. Spend more time with friends and learn mutually beneficial cooperation.
2 − 4:
This month it is important to give more attention to strengthening your home front, to putting order into the secondary matters for which you previously had no time.
You will not be too greatly distracted from work, yet you will discover that there is now more room in your life. Significant income this month is unlikely, so it may be necessary to plan carefully the resources you have on hand. On the other hand, a good chance to attract helpers appears. If you are patient and tactful enough, it is quite likely that someone will want to take part of your load upon themselves.
2 − 5:
Heightened romanticism may make it hard for you to focus on business this month. You realize how many potential partners are around you, and you want to take the maximum that life can offer.
Because of your tendency to make a mountain out of a molehill, changes in attachments and friendships are possible. Try not to rush too much, lest you later come to regret decisions made in haste.
2 − 6:
An important month for the relationship with your beloved. A chance appears to take a step toward reconciliation, to declare your love, to grow even closer to each other. Be sure to go together to a classical music concert or an art exhibition. At work during this time it is best to attend to the aesthetic side of whatever you are engaged in.
Such a small thing as the outward appearance of a product or a document can greatly influence how it is received. Try to rest more in nature, and do not begrudge time for your family, parents, and relatives. This is a good month for buying jewelry and fashionable clothing.
2 − 7:
This month life may resemble a complex puzzle — so many conventions, details, and nuances reveal themselves within it. You will probably have the feeling that grasping all the conditions fully and solving this puzzle is beyond your strength.
The source of the difficulties may lie in the fact that you are digging too deep and relying excessively on logic and common sense, whereas this month it is better to trust intuition. Difficulties in partnerships are possible because you will learn something that had been carefully concealed. At the same time, you will have enough reason to free yourself from a long-festering problem.
2 − 8:
Although on the whole this year can be considered the peak of the entire Epicycle, without a breather it will be hard for you to accomplish everything you have planned.
Just as in an advance it is important not to outrun your supply lines, so now you need to slow your pace and look around: take care not to leave behind something truly important, not to be left without support. Despite all the strength and influence now available to you, it may be more advantageous to make a compromise and bring strong allies over to your side. December would be wisely used for taking stock of the closing year and restoring your strength. It would be good to let matters develop on their own and to spend time alone with a loved one.
2 − 9: Most likely, during these months you will feel especially clearly that your life is slowing down and that some stage of it is drawing to a close. Yet do not give in to despondency and fatigue. Rest — best of all in the lap of nature — and gather your strength. In February it would be good to give away to others, ungrudgingly, everything you owe them: belongings, money, obligations. Do not rush to acquire anything new. In November you will most likely already have a presentiment of what awaits you in the next Epicycle, so allow yourself to dream and to ponder your prospects without haste.
3 − 1: An extremely creative month. A good time for communicating with interesting people, for short journeys, for meeting new friends. You are brimming with ideas connected with a new theme that has recently entered your life. And the most interesting thing is that the more you share your ideas, the more of them come to you. You will probably spend more money this month than you planned, but you will do so with pleasure.
3 − 2: A time of interesting new acquaintances and original ideas. The atmosphere of the year does not favor significant achievements, yet on the whole life this month becomes more interesting and romantic. Try writing to those of your friends with whom you have not been in touch for a long while. Music and painting will help you well to replenish your reserves of inspiration. Use every opportunity for sport and games in the fresh air. This is a good, productive month for those whose creative pursuits involve some painstaking activity that demands considerable attention to detail and, at the same time, good intuition.
3 − 3: A very creative and interesting month, yet the energy of the Three is excessively strong. As a result you are inclined toward infatuations, unwise spending of money and energy, and you prefer not even to take up matters that require patience and perseverance. That said, this month may prove favorable for study, since you are able to grasp ideas on the fly. If you are engaged in creative work, try at least to simply write down all the ideas that come into your head — they will then last you a long time. But if your work involves a serious attitude and considerable material responsibility, this month it is better to take a vacation.
3 − 4: Although on the whole this year is not easy and demands considerable effort from you, in the Month of the Three fortune will smile on you, so do not view life gloomily — relax and try to act not as circumstances compel you, but as you truly wish. It is quite possible that as a result you will find original, unconventional solutions to the tasks before you, and the work will turn out to be not so difficult after all, or at least far less tedious.
3 − 5: Many interesting matters and enthusiasms will pull you in different directions. A wonderful month for creative people seeking new ways of self-expression, but those whose work is bound up with responsibility and established order may decide that the whole world has plunged into chaos. You will gain much enjoyment by setting off on a journey with a loved one or with a company of good friends, yet try to limit your expenses, however hard that may be. And if you are offered a higher position or a serious problem, ask to postpone the decision until the following month.
3 − 6: A sociable month. Relationships with those closest to you fill with joy and merriment; together you find it interesting and good. You fall in love easily, and the Three's gift for expressing thoughts will help you confess your love. Do something pleasant for those around you more often, and they will not remain in your debt. This is also a very creative month, helping artists, musicians, and indeed all passionate people to find new images.
3 − 7: The nature of the Year of the Seven is such that you leave much unspoken and, as a result, overburden your soul. This month, however, you can be open and candid. Have it out with those people in your relationships with whom problems have accumulated, and you will immediately notice how much lighter you feel. And for those engaged in research, the right moment arrives to put their results into shape, to write a dissertation, a book, or at least an article. This is the month when the hidden becomes manifest.
3 − 8: This month is like a stop along the road to refuel the car. On the one hand, during this time you are standing still, not moving, but on the other hand, you are securing the ability to drive many more kilometers. So it is now: not the most productive time in terms of work, unless you are engaged in purely creative work, but on the other hand, by communicating with those around you and catching fire from various ideas, you are securing a store of energy and enthusiasm for many months ahead. Trips, business journeys, professional development courses, and specialty seminars are recommended. It is also good to explain an upcoming task to your subordinates — your words this month will sound especially clear and convincing.
3 − 9: March may be somewhat ambiguous, since on the one hand a nine-year period in your life is coming to an end, and it is quite likely that you have to part with many matters and people, but on the other hand you are full of ideas and optimism, and you want to undertake something immediately. So use your store of optimism to give back to others, joyfully and with a light heart, what you owe them, and to leave in the past what you will not take into the future. December will be filled with creative inspiration and excitement at the approach of a new period of life. This month is especially good for performers, artists, and all people of creative professions.
4 − 1: After the boundless optimism of the previous month, your new undertaking suddenly begins to stall, running again and again into obstacles. This is entirely natural: the natural rhythms are simply helping you look at your endeavor more soberly and objectively. If what you have conceived cannot withstand even the slightest unfavorable influence, then perhaps it is not worth spending time and energy on such ephemeral schemes? Concentrate on what matters most, roll up your sleeves, and put in some real work — then this month will help you significantly strengthen your position.
4 − 2: A month that demands considerable patience from you, since you will have to work hard and persistently at tying together various rather insignificant details. It is quite likely that you will be limited in resources and that for the work you do you will receive no honors or rewards — only the satisfaction of a job done. And yet, do not give in to pessimism. And when an opportunity to rest presents itself, try to restore your strength to the fullest. Nature will help you "recharge your batteries" if you rest out of town, in the fresh air. Also try to find yourself helpers and shift part of the work onto them.
4 − 3: A valuable opportunity appears to test your ideas in practice. That is exactly how you should regard the obstacles and delays that will probably arise this month. Those around you will hint that it is time for you to become more practical and serious. Well, perhaps they are right — at least when the Month of the Four is running in your life. Try to put your affairs in order, to set everything in its place, to clear away the backlog of unfinished current work. Postpone trips until the following month, and buy only those things that are truly necessary and will serve you for a long time. As a result you will notice that your whole life has become more purposeful and efficient.
4 − 4: A rather difficult month. It will seem to you that life has piled tasks on you beyond all measure, and at the same time is in no hurry to reward you for the results of your conscientious work. Well, perhaps the lesson lies precisely in learning not to wait for praise, but to value the feeling of satisfaction from a job well done. Do not give in to pessimism. If it becomes difficult, try to do everything very slowly, advancing forward in the smallest of steps. Do not strive to take on additional responsibility — what you already have is quite enough for you.
4 − 5: It had already begun to seem to you that the world has no boundaries and that everything in it is possible, yet now you increasingly run into limitations and realize that any freedom has its limits. Probably the role of this month in your life is to bring you down to earth a little, to make you understand that much cannot be done on the run and that it is time to move at last from promises and beautiful plans to actual work. A well-thought-out plan will help you forget nothing and concentrate on the task.
4 − 6: This month a good opportunity appears to take up the cosmetic renovation of your home or other domestic work that requires a certain effort but in return makes life more pleasant and comfortable. Offer practical help to your parents or other loved ones — perhaps one of them is in straitened financial circumstances and you have the chance to offer support. Thanks to patience and diligence, you will manage to make noticeable progress in creative projects that require considerable effort.
4 − 7: You may feel now like a miner engaged in hard physical labor somewhere deep underground. The deeper you penetrate into the essence of the problem, the more work piles up on you and the more various obstacles you have to overcome. As a result you begin to understand things that are incomprehensible to others and you acquire invaluable practical experience, yet your mood by no means improves because of this. Try to look at things more detachedly; do not take everything to heart. More optimistic times will come soon — be patient a little longer.
4 − 8: This month you reach the peak of your power and are able to move mountains, quite literally. True, those around you will not appreciate your achievements right away, since you will be too busy to boast — but next month you will let yourself go and take up self-promotion in earnest. You now have the chance to create something very reliable and long-lasting, something that will later serve you as a support for many years. Moreover, if you take on heightened responsibility now, you will soon gain the chance to climb a rung or two up the career ladder.
4 − 9: Put your affairs in order, recall to whom you owe anything, and make an effort to repay your debts. This month it is important to set everything in its place. There is no need to strive to peer beyond the horizon or to set anything aside for the future. Take up what is at hand and act, unhurriedly and thoroughly. A good month to move from words to deeds, from theory to practice, and to do at least something real for the sake of lofty ideals.
5 − 1:
Caught up in something new that has arisen in your life this year, you suddenly discover that many different paths lead to the desired goal, and each of them is interesting in its own way. And it is entirely normal if you want to be distracted a little and try out the various possibilities.
The main thing is that you nevertheless not forget what is most important to you. A wonderful month for travel, especially if you set off to a country new to you. Meet new people and accumulate impressions — all of it will one day, in one way or another, come in handy.
5 − 2: A great many potential partners, colleagues, and allies appear in your life, and it may not be easy to decide which of them is more suitable for you. Do not rush to make a final decision or to bind yourself with any obligations whatsoever before the end of the month, or you will become mired in endless wavering and doubt. Allow yourself to be changeable, noncommittal, and superficial — relying, of course, on your sense of proportion. Consider that fate has given you the chance to take a good look around. Do not miss the chance to set off on a trip — there too a meeting may await you that will later prove important.
5 − 3: Your creative pursuits this month are marked by particular variety. After the labors of the previous month you can allow yourself to relax a little and taste the blessings of the world around you. Looking closely, you will discover that sources of creative inspiration can be found in anyone and in anything, and that the joys of life help replenish your reserves of energy. It is important, however, to remember that joys and pleasures are not an end in themselves. In the pursuit of them you can lose both your path and yourself. At work, try taking up sales. When such a combination of numbers is at work in your destiny, you are able to sell anything to anyone. It is important, however, to remember that joys and pleasures are not an end in themselves. In the pursuit of them you can lose both your path and yourself. At work, try taking up sales. When such a combination of numbers is at work in your destiny, you are able to sell anything to anyone.
5 − 4: A month of respite. You gain the chance to straighten your back and look around. Be sure to pay attention to the new opportunities that fate offers you. It is quite possible that you will discover a roundabout route or an alternative solution to the problem that concerns you most this year. Be flexible and receptive, share your experience with those around you, and one of them will want to come to your aid. Think about what practical benefit you can draw from the changes taking place around you. This is a good month to take up self-promotion.
5 − 5: A very restless month, full of fuss and all sorts of different matters that are often incompatible with one another. It is perhaps better, for now, to set aside those matters that require attention and concentration. Better to take up promoting your business, go to exhibitions and conferences, and travel more. Problems are possible in those areas of your life that require reliability and constancy — for example, in marital relations. Avoid making decisions intended for a long stretch of time: right now you have too poor a notion of what awaits you around the bend.
5 − 6: Various changes and quarrels are possible in your relationships with those close to you — as a rule over trifles, without any serious cause whatsoever. However, the disturber of the peace will most likely be you yourself, and you yourself will be best able to defuse the conflict by adapting to the situation. This month you are more susceptible than usual to the influence of others, and in some cases this can be useful — for example, when you need advice on how best to renovate the apartment — yet in matters of fundamental importance try to preserve your individuality.
5 − 7: This month you emerge from your confinement, and on the one hand the variety of the world around you can entertain you splendidly and provide a wonderful rest, but on the other hand, if you still keep brooding over your problems, the surroundings may seem to you fussy and unnerving. Allow yourself to relax a little; take a break from serious thoughts. The world around you is overflowing with useful information, and the hint you need may suddenly come from where you least expect it.
5 − 8: Changes, trips, and a great many varied matters await you. Be prepared for your plans for the future to change, and you will not necessarily have the ability to influence the changes taking place. Be flexible, learn to adapt to new conditions whatever they may be, and do not waste time and nerves on pointless arguments. This is a good time to promote your business, to invest in entertainment and travel, and to attract the financial resources of others.
5 − 9: It is very hard to resist traveling when such a combination of numbers is at work. The whole world opens up before you, and everything around seems extremely interesting and full of meaning. This month an all-consuming romantic infatuation is possible, which, however, is unlikely to prove lasting. Do not plan anything long-term: everything you conceive now will hold meaning only until September.
6 − 1: The time has come to slow the pace somewhat and to understand that what matters is not only what you do, but also how you do it. The results of your work should please, above all, you yourself. Pay attention to those close to you — your family, your parents — how has your absorption in the new endeavor this year affected them? Perhaps you need to spend more time with those who are dear to you: their support will be very useful to you next month. A good month to start a family, or perhaps to meet a stranger who will in time become one of the people closest to you.
6 − 2: One of the most suitable months for entering into marriage. It is characterized by a striving for mutual understanding, emotional closeness, and inner comfort. You sense harmony and beauty keenly, and you strive to make both your own life and the lives of those close to you more pleasant. A suitable month for taking up music and painting, for attending concerts and art exhibitions. Perhaps you will want to indulge yourself or someone else with an expensive piece of jewelry or fashionable clothing.
6 − 3: This year you do not lack original ideas and creative designs, but now it is important for you to try to make others understand and appreciate them. In the Month of the Six it is not enough merely to be vivid and original; it is also necessary to strive for harmony, to have a sense of proportion, and to take your partner's point of view into account. If your family has a shared pastime, then now is the most suitable month for it. And by going on vacation together, you will gain a great deal of enjoyment. But if you do not yet have a family, then why not fall in love this month?
6 − 4: Someone is sure to come to your aid this month, especially if you find yourself in a truly difficult situation. But do not forget, either, to offer support to those who need it. This is the most suitable month to renovate or to begin building your home. Any work you do together with the whole family will draw you closer and improve mutual understanding. Of all the arts, such a combination of numbers corresponds most to dance and sculpture, and from the standpoint of work it favors collective efforts of every kind.
6 − 5: Many people, including complete strangers, will count on your emotional support and understanding this month. Unexpected surprises within the family or from those close to you are possible, ones that will force you to change your plans. But on the whole, against the background of the hectic Year of the Five, the month will be calmer and more harmonious. To restore the inner strength spent on helping others, a trip to some place familiar and beloved by you may be recommended.
6 − 6: Family relationships, household matters, and community activity come to the fore. Many people will turn to you for advice and heartfelt understanding, and this will in principle accord with your own wishes. The striving to make life more harmonious and comfortable is strong, and this month you may resolve to buy more comfortable furniture, works of art, or jewelry. Interest in the beautiful intensifies, so if the talent of an artist slumbers within you, head to the store for an easel and paints.
6 − 7: If throughout the year you resembled a hermit monk or a detective, then now the time has come to remember good manners and step out into society. Try now to prove that your seclusion was not in vain and that your findings can be of interest not only to you alone — then you will be able to secure universal understanding and support. The month favors those forms of art that require considerable concentration, detachment from the world, and devotion to one's craft.
6 − 8: Your successes will be even more impressive if this month you draw those close to you in to help and make them feel that they are doing a great and important thing together with you. Do not neglect the opinion of the collective; take steps to make it well-disposed toward you. Perhaps you should organize a club or community of those who are sincerely interested in your activity and can help you become more popular and influential.
6 − 9: Usually in the Year of the Nine people are troubled by something distant and abstract, yet now the time has come to take care of those near to you, to show them that you can be generous and all-forgiving not only in words. Ahead of you lies a new stage of life, which will begin next January, so do not begrudge the warmth of your soul in order to strengthen relationships with those who are dear to you and to secure the support of your closest people in times of change. On top of everything else, this month will help your artistic talent awaken.
7 − 1: Probably in the previous months of this year you pictured your new design only in the most general terms, and that was enough. Now, however, you need to approach the matter in greater detail, to understand thoroughly what you are engaged in. Otherwise, next month weaknesses that hinder success may reveal themselves in your project. Do not begrudge the time to be in solitude, to think, to try to unravel what seems unclear to you.
7 − 2: A desire may arise in you to test the strength of your relationships with others, to make sure all is well within them. If the matter concerns a business partnership, this is an entirely reasonable urge; a certain measure of thoroughness will help you avoid unpleasant surprises in the future. However, personal emotional relationships do not withstand being "taken apart screw by screw." If you give free rein to your jealousy and suspicion, you will simply complicate life — both for yourself and for your loved one. This month demands calm, patience, and understanding from you.
7 − 3: A time of reappraising values. This month will probably be less optimistic than the year as a whole, but at some point one must slow the pace and reflect on the true meaning of what you are doing, on the underlying basis of what you are able to perceive directly. You will probably need time to analyze events and compare opinions. A certain measure of wariness in your attitude toward affairs this month will only be to your benefit.
7 − 4: There is already plenty of work this year, and now, under the influence of the Seven, you also begin to recheck everything many times over and to subject it to doubt. You become a meticulous controller, an auditor, a critic — for yourself or for others. This is a very useful stage, since as a result whatever you do will become strong from within and able to withstand any trial. However, you should see to it that you have enough time to rest, to restore your inner strength. And the best rest at this time is solitude, silence, and peace.
7 − 5: Too great a number of varied matters this year did not allow you to give serious thought to the true essence of what you are engaged in, yet now comes a time of doubts and serious reflection. Perhaps you feel a lack of information and will need to carry out research to learn everything you require. Or you may decide to go and study something important for your work. In all cases, try not to be satisfied with the most obvious and simple answers. Think, compare, analyze, search for the hidden meaning.
7 − 6: This month it is important for you to have a place where you can withdraw into solitude, calm down, and restore your inner strength. Any company, even those closest to you, will be undesirable at such moments. You may become irritable, suspicious, sarcastic, or, on the contrary, burdened by an inadequate sense of guilt. And the recipe is simple — rest, calm down, and then confide in a loved one and not pick again and again at the painful subject.
7 − 7: A potentially very important month, since your mind will be unusually perceptive and you will be able to unravel such riddles as were previously beyond your powers. Surround yourself with books, take up scholarly research or the study of some dizzyingly complex subject. True, the role of a bookworm or a bluestocking is not to everyone's liking, and if you are usually rather sociable, this month may seem dishearteningly dull to you. In that case, might it make sense to go to a health resort and take up improving your health?
7 − 8: Against the background of a generally successful and very important year of your life, this month is perceived as a period of braking, of slowing, of inner doubts. Perhaps some weak points will reveal themselves in your project, and they will have to be eliminated urgently, while also rechecking everything else. Or the doubts may simply be the result of your difficult emotional state. In any case, this month it is useful to make a pause, to rest from affairs, to halt your unstoppable rush toward achievements. A journey to holy places, a visit to a monastery, or a stay in a secluded hotel in the mountains will give you very good support.
7 − 9: Use your analytical abilities to think over and compare all the achievements and failures of the closing Epicycle. It is quite likely that some of your ideals are now in a state of crisis, but for the moment it is important not to give in to emotions, but to take stock detachedly and objectively, to consider what else you can do to give back to the past what you do not intend to take with you into the future. You will cope with this month's tasks most successfully if you possess some religious or other spiritual experience. But if you have no such experience, then perhaps the time has come to gain it, by listening closely to what exactly your soul strives for.
8 − 1: It is probably this very month that you will be able to see the first results of the new endeavor that appeared in your life this year. True, the results for now may be not material, but will manifest first of all in your ability to command the situation and to exert influence over others. Boldly take on the role of leader; do not be afraid to take part in a competition or contest. The further advancement of your project depends on how successfully you display your organizational abilities now.
8 − 2: This month the deciding voice belongs to your partner, and not everything turns out the way you would wish. However, you have the chance to display your strength, to use your influence over those around you, to show that you know how to handle money and manage the situation. Perhaps you will have to match strength with someone, and even if you are not the one to prevail, try to show the very best of what you are capable.
8 − 3:
Your words, opinions, and ideas possess particular power this month, and you are more able than ever to impress others and shift the balance of forces in your favor. For people of creative professions, it is useful at this time to take steps toward receiving payment, a fee, or some other financial result of their work.
And for those engaged in business, it is important to consider whether there is some unconventional solution capable of significantly increasing the productivity of their work. Make full use of your imagination, take on responsible projects, and you will prevail. This month is good for large-scale acquisitions and sales.
8 − 4: No one doubts that you are able to work much and effectively, yet one warrior does not make a battle, and now what matters is the ability to distribute your work, to entrust it to others, and to ensure that they handle the task no worse than you. Think too about how to attract the resources of possible partners in order to bring your work to a qualitatively new level. It is quite likely that, having displayed your abilities properly, you will become the leading candidate for a promotion. This is a good month for acquiring real estate.
8 − 5: Use your influence over all your acquaintances, friends, and the other people gathered around you this year — you will be amazed at how impressive the practical results you can achieve in the role of leader and organizer. A good month for marketing research, for large-scale promotion of your activity, and for well-grounded risk. And if you are looking for work, then, by presenting yourself well, you have a chance to obtain even more attractive terms than you had hoped for. The main thing is to be confident in yourself.
8 − 6: A month of important decisions in domestic and family matters. Perhaps you will want to move to a more comfortable and spacious home or to invest money in something prestigious — for example, an expensive car. In the event that you want to obtain some important decision from a loved one, your parents, or other relatives, it is precisely this month that you will be able to use your influence most effectively. Those engaged in art need, this month, to become at least a little bit businesspeople and to sell the results of their creative work with dignity.
8 − 7: Knowledge is real power — that is what you need to understand this month. By spending the Year of the Seven unraveling riddles and bringing various secrets to the surface, you gain knowledge that makes you stronger, allows you to exert influence over others, and lets you obtain from them what you require. It is quite likely that your mind and analytical abilities will help you find well-paid work this month. Perhaps you will decide to take up the study of accounting or other disciplines without which it would be impossible to achieve maximum efficiency.
8 − 8: This month you reach the peak of your authority and your ability to influence the situation, so try to justify the trust placed in you. Boldly take on the leading role and large-scale, responsible tasks, and manage finances skillfully. Perhaps you will be offered an especially difficult task as a test. Remember that what matters is not how much work you pile onto yourself personally, but how successfully you can organize its execution by others. Performers and other representatives of creative professions gain the chance to significantly increase their popularity. To do so, one must become a bit of a businessperson, making maximum effective use of one's influence, as well as financial and other resources.
8 − 9: Display the utmost influence and authority in the affairs of the closing Epicycle. It may well be that the matter with which you are most occupied now is short-lived, and if so, you have surely already sensed it. And yet now it is important to display the utmost ability, to show yourself at your very best. One way or another, this will prove important for your future. A good time for working with foreigners and for cooperating with large international companies.
9 − 1: More than half a year has passed since the new Epicycle began and something new entered your life. And now comes the stage when you realize that some of the undertakings have not justified themselves. With some things you have to part; an understanding arises that you are not all-powerful, and this is a little saddening. However, this month is like the moment when the first stage of a multistage rocket has finished its work: it accelerated the rocket to the required speed and is now jettisoned. The experience and the understanding you have accumulated over the past months are very valuable; they will allow you to move on more actively and successfully. So do not be saddened, but rather dream of what lies ahead for you.
9 − 2: This month may bring the ending of some relationship, business or personal, or else you may want to rid yourself of a dependency that burdens you. It is best to change your surroundings and distract yourself somewhat from your cares: set off on a distant journey, recall your schoolday passion for painting and take up creating an artistic panel that will astound the whole world, or something of that sort. In short, change the scale, and look at your present situation from the standpoint of the Universe.
9 − 3: Your creative designs and pursuits rise to a new level this month. Think about how to bring what you are engaged in to completion and then proclaim your achievement to the whole world. Be generous: the more you give to others now, the more you will receive in return. Believe not so much in common sense and logic as in your own luck — and it will not let you down. Do not begin a new endeavor this month, even if the desire is great. Postpone the start until the following month, and for now try to vividly picture, to visualize, what you are striving for.
9 − 4: It is quite possible that this year you can work tirelessly and not notice time passing, yet the Month of the Nine reminds you that one day what you are engaged in must be brought to completion, wrapped in a beautiful package, and handed over to others. And the more wholeheartedly and sincerely you part with your brainchild, the more strength and resources you will gain for new accomplishments. However, save the start of a new endeavor for the beginning of the following month.
9 − 5: Probably this year you have many different matters, and it would be hard to concentrate on any one of them, yet you still need to clarify the situation somehow. Most likely, some of your pursuits have lost their meaning and no longer stir you as they did. By parting with them, you will gain the reserve of strength and time needed to bring the remaining matters to a qualitatively new level. This is one of the best months for travel and for communicating with foreigners, and it does not matter whether you travel on business or are simply resting.
9 − 6: Do not begrudge the warmth of your soul for those close to you; share generously with them what you have, and in return you will receive their support, which is so important to you this year. You will probably decide to change something in the running of the household, and you do not yet have a very clear notion of what you need, yet you understand perfectly well what you want to part with. This is a very creative month for people connected in one way or another with art. It is important to direct your energy toward completing unfinished works.
9 − 7: Your search for truth will be especially active this month, since your analytical mind will be strengthened and inspired by some vivid, creative idea. Perhaps you will finally solve some important problem and feel relief, yet it may also turn out that the only possible solution to one of your most painful problems is to forgive and forget everything. Share generously with others what you have managed to clarify and understand.
9 − 8: In January of this year it is important to understand that ahead lies a very important and responsible period of your life, so you need to rid yourself of all the affairs and relationships that simply drain your strength and energy while giving nothing in return. Visualize your ideals, picture what you would like to achieve, and mobilize all your creative potential for the undertakings of February. And in October you will already be able to take the first stock of your achievements and chart new prospects, though most likely you will already feel the autumnal chill of the next, closing year of the Epicycle. This is the start of the descent from the summit you conquered in the Year of the Eight.
9 − 9:
A month of completing the most important affairs of the Epicycle and, at the same time, of the hopes you place upon the future. You may be troubled by uncertainty; you clearly understand that much is now coming to an end, but you do not yet know what lies ahead. Relax and allow the troublesome situations to resolve themselves without your intervention. Give away, ungrudgingly, everything you can give to others; be wise and forbearing. Do not begin anything new, but do give yourself the chance to dream to your heart's content.
Thus we have become acquainted with the concept of Individual Months. This is a very convenient planning tool, especially for matters of a corresponding scale. Let us say, by beginning a matter in the Month of the One, you can already plan the "harvest" in the Month of the Eight, thereby enlisting the rhythms of the Universe to your aid. Next we will examine numerological rhythms in even greater detail, descending to the level of the individual day — or more precisely, the Individual Day.
